Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> Is also Public Affairs Director and Producer/Host of "Panorama." Hutcheson interviews people associated with "the arts, consumer issues, health, history, topics of interest to business people, some general interest and special events throughout the listening area (tri-state)," she explains. She wants to see more "stories with a connection to Central and South AL, Western GA and Northern FL." Contact by phone or mail; no faxes. Send a press release, press kit or story pitch. For guests, she wants "someone who is personable, articulate and can relate to regional listeners. [It is] preferable that a guest have ties to AL, GA or FL. Because this is non-commercial radio, we can't interview people who have ties to politics or commercial enterprises." Calls are best Mon.-Thu. after 10 a.m.
